blockingIssues.description: Chain services in docker-compose.yml define build: . without image:. docker stack deploy ignores build and requires image, so deployment will fail.
CD deploy step runs docker stack deploy without sourcing .env. Stack deploy does not auto-load .env, so RPC_URL_* and ETHERSCAN_TOKEN resolve empty.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Docker Swarm deploy gotchas to .factory/library/environment.md documenting image: requirement and .env handling differences for docker stack deploy.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In deploy guidance, explicitly require dual build+image service definitions when compose files are used for both local docker compose and docker stack deploy workflows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of docker-swarm-deploy found all chain services had build but no image, causing Swarm deploy failure.

rejectedObservations.observation: Create a deployment runbook from cd.yml comments.
rejectedObservations.reason: out-of-scope for this scrutiny pass; recommendation is valid but not required to resolve the detected deployment correctness failures
